description: Boolean attribute props (?disabled, ?checked, ?hidden) should toggle attributes correctly
initialVDOM: dom.el('div', 'root', {}, [dom.el('button', 'btn', { '?disabled': state.disabled }, [dom.txt('Submit', 'btn-txt')]), dom.el('input', 'cb', { type: 'checkbox', '?checked': state.checked }), dom.el('p', 'para', { '?hidden': state.hidden }, [dom.txt('Visible text', 'p-txt')])])
